title: Malaysian Stir-Fried Shiitake Mushrooms
description: A flavorful and savory Malaysian-inspired stir-fry dish made with shiitake mushrooms and a hint of garlicky goodness. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they start to brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the sliced shiitake mushrooms and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the garlicky stir-fry sauce, dense soy sauce, and mushrooms oil. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
